title: Awarapan
desc: Shivam, a hitman, is ordered to watch a woman. He finds out she's trapped in a trafficking ring and decides to help her reunite with her true love.

title: Hero No. 1
desc: A rich businessman hides his identity and pretends to be Raju, happily doing household chores. His skills and charm help him win over his girlfriend's family, all for love.

title: Singh Is King
desc: Happy, known for his wild antics, is sent to bring Lakhan to his ailing father. In Australia, events take a turn as Happy accidentally assumes Lakhan's role as the local underworld king.

title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
desc: Ramkishan and Mamta live happily with their sons. But when tragedy strikes their daughter, Mamta's heart changes, and she turns against her kind stepson, Vivek.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan, a businessman with a simple wife, and Narayan, jobless with an ultra-modern wife, try to impress each other's spouses, leading to a chain of hilarious mishaps.

title: Filler
desc: A quick preview of movie and TV show highlights-emotional, romantic, and action-packed scenes that keep audiences hooked, offering glimpses of drama, love, and thrilling entertainment.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan, a businessman with a simple wife, and Narayan, jobless with an ultra-modern wife, try to impress each other's spouses, leading to a chain of hilarious mishaps.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
desc: Krishna and Vasudha's love story faces tragedy when Krishna is accused of murder. Released after 23 years in prison, he seeks closure and an emotional reunionwith Vasudha.

title: Khatarnak
desc: Suraj, a charming criminal, falls head over heels for Dr. Sangeeta. She's willing to marry him, but there's a catch: he must turn his life around first.

title: Fateh (1991)
desc: Ranvir, Karan, and Salim, elite commandos trained by Major Anand, are devastated by his death. When they suspect gangster Samrat is behind it, the trio embarks on a dangerous mission.

title: Khushi
desc: A young man from a non-religious family falls in love with his rival's daughter, the child of a strict Hindu leader, sparking conflict between love, faith, and family pride.

title: Gulaal
desc: Dilip, a law student from Rajpur, is assaulted by Jadhwal's gang. Seeking revenge, he becomes entangled in the dark and dangerous world of politics.

title: Super Singh
desc: Super Singh, a carefree man living with his mother in Canada, gains superpowers and returns to Punjab to battle drug lords and corrupt politicians threatening his homeland.

title: Pardes
desc: Kishorilal chooses Ganga for his NRI son. But Ganga shares a deeper bond with Arjun, Kishorilal's foster son, leading to a conflict between duty and love.

title: Mom
desc: Devki, a biology teacher, turns to private detective DK after her stepdaughter's rapists are acquitted. Fueled by anguish, she vows revenge and sets out to deliver justice herself.

title: Holiday - A Soldier Is Never Off Duty
desc: Virat, a soldier, uncovers a terrorist plot to bomb Mumbai. He assembles his team to stop the attack and protect the city from destruction.

title: Kalyug
desc: Kunal and Renuka's happy marriage is shattered when an intimate video surfaces online. Kunal sets out to expose the culprits behind the illegal racket and seek justice.
